jsRuntime.policy: Active LTS baseline for desktop development and packaging

notes: Declared manifests were updated to current stable versions as of 2026-03-30.
TypeScript remains on the latest 5.x line because the current stable typescript-eslint release does not yet accept TypeScript 6.
The archive still does not claim that real upstream ffhn and htmlcut binaries are bundled.
The runtime contract remains GUI -> ffhn -> htmlcut; this is a toolchain refresh, not a product-boundary change.
